{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Wei elders
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Wei elders]] act as conductors for the [[White Fox]] [[madra]] display.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c8">''Unsouled'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Wei clan]] elders stand on a hill overlooking the road.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c12">''Bloodline'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
